desiredMonitor.name: Exa AI social market monitor
desiredMonitor.scope: AI social apps, AI companions, AI entertainment, language-exchange social apps, and IRL/offline real-human social products.

nativeMonitor.fallback: Codex daily automation runs node scripts/run-all.mjs with Exa Search API monitor lanes.

latestHandledAlerts.name: Meta is building an AI Pendant and this time it has a working wearables business behind it — TFN
latestHandledAlerts.reason: Meta AI pendant 是 AI wearable / ambient companion 入口的市场背景信号，能辅助判断硬件入口和订阅化方向；当前不是独立 consumer social app、线下真人社交产品或融资事件，不升级主表或融资时间线。

latestHandledAlerts.name: How Chamberlain Coffee Is Winning the TikTok-to-Google Attribution War – D2C Times
latestHandledAlerts.source: 2026-06-02 monitor · 投放 / 付费获客证据
